issue.title: www.airmiles.ca

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: A: Cannot reproduce
labels.description: Filters devs cannot reproduce this issue

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.airmiles.ca/en/offers/offer-details.html?id=ef68d4e0-1349-479f-ad1d-4f9148e4f393&utm_campaign=AC-RE+New+AirMiles+Cash+offer+%28New+multiplier+banner%29&utm_source=sfmc&utm_medium=email&utm_content=381370&j=1200912&sfmc_sub=212357196&l=210_HTML&u=44527470&mid=100001624&jb=699&utm_term=Button-+OPT+IN&utm_id=7af57747-b27b-462c-823e-38ee9cf00d82&sfmc_id=212357196&sfmc_activityid=3852f0c8-05de-410a-bf61-92d2b2805d21&sfmc_journey_id=7af57747-b27b-462c-823e-38ee9cf00d82&sfmc_journey_name=CAR-+EeN+wiAMrliseC+sa+hfoef+rN%28wem+luitlpei+rabnnre%29&sfmc_activity_id=3852f0c8-05de-410a-bf61](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.airmiles.ca%2Fen%2Foffers%2Foffer-details.html%3Fid%3Def68d4e0-1349-479f-ad1d-4f9148e4f393%26utm_campaign%3DAC-RE%2BNew%2BAirMiles%2BCash%2Boffer%2B%2528New%2Bmultiplier%2Bbanner%2529%26utm_source%3Dsfmc%26utm_medium%3Demail%26utm_content%3D381370%26j%3D1200912%26sfmc_sub%3D212357196%26l%3D210_HTML%26u%3D44527470%26mid%3D100001624%26jb%3D699%26utm_term%3DButton-%2BOPT%2BIN%26utm_id%3D7af57747-b27b-462c-823e-38ee9cf00d82%26sfmc_id%3D212357196%26sfmc_activityid%3D3852f0c8-05de-410a-bf61-92d2b2805d21%26sfmc_journey_id%3D7af57747-b27b-462c-823e-38ee9cf00d82%26sfmc_journey_name%3DCAR-%2BEeN%2BwiAMrliseC%2Bsa%2Bhfoef%2BrN%2528wem%2Bluitlpei%2Brabnnre%2529%26sfmc_activity_id%3D3852f0c8-05de-410a-bf61) ### Comment > page does not load ### Screenshots

Screenshot 2 ![Screenshot 2](https://reports-img.adguard.com/LlOeQJP.png)

AdGuard Base

Other:
Filter unblocking search ads and self-promotion

comment.body:
@zloyden Try going through the login flow at https://www.bluerewards.ca/en/login.html (enter a fake email/password).

This fixes it:

```adblock
||smetrics.airmiles.ca^$badfilter
```
